name: linGetWakeupLength
title: linGetWakeupLength
tables: Deprecated Function Replaced by linWakeupFrame selectors.
With this function it is possible to retrieve a length of an occurred Wakeup frame.
wakeupFrame Bus-event of type LIN Wakeup frame.
Returns the retrieved length [in units of 10 µsec] or zero on failure.
Example Query the length of the wakeup frames on linWakeupFrame{write("Wake-up frame length: %d µs", linGetWakeupLength(this)*10);}
